User Story: As a couple, I want to open my gallery from an email link without creating an account.
As a couple, I want a private gallery protected by a PIN so only we see it.
As a couple, I want to claim an account so my album persists and I get notifications.
As a couple, I want social login to save my selections across devices.
As a couple, I want to browse all delivered photos in a clean gallery.
As a couple, I want to filter photos by a person's face to find specific people.
As a couple, I want to filter by scene (ceremony, dance, candid) to jump to a moment.
As a couple, I want full-screen photo view with swipe navigation.
As a couple, I want to heart photos I love while browsing.
As a couple, I want to select which photos go in our album so the photographer edits the right ones.
As a couple, I want to see how many I've picked vs the album target.
As a couple, I want to submit our final picks so the photographer starts editing.
As a couple, I want to leave notes on photos (crop, remove object) for the editor.
As a couple, I want to approve edited photos or request revisions.
As a couple, I want a beautiful lasting digital album of our final photos.
As a couple, I want permanent access to our album (not an expiring link).
As a couple, I want to download our final high-res photos.
As a couple, I want to download the whole album as a zip.
As a couple, I want to share our album with family via a link.
As a couple, I want to post select photos to social media easily.
As a couple, I want to see photos guests uploaded from their angle.
As a couple, I want to be notified when new photos or the final album are ready.
